scope: Realtime conversation phase machine, queue and fanout engine, session config, transport request shape, and startup context prelude

requiredBehaviors: maintains idle connecting active closing phases
replaces an active session by closing the previous connection before starting the next one
applies bounded queue policies for audio user text handoff output control fan-in and output fanout
exposes running state stale fanout registration and active finish semantics
edgeCases: audio input after shutdown raises the conversation inactive error
audio frames are accepted without throwing when capture outpaces the input loop
slow fanout applies output event backpressure without unbounded growth
no-fanout output event overflow closes the active session before growth exceeds the bounded queue
shutdown returns after bounded drain when a fanout consumer keeps awaiting
shutdown returns after bounded drain when transport reads remain pending after close
server-side termination emits closing before returning to idle
duplicate fanout registration for the same active session is rejected
immediate transport EOF during start does not publish a stale active session
immediate transport read errors during start do not publish a stale active session
overlapping starts serialize connection and close the replaced transport
transport close failures still finalize shutdown and server-side termination
a pending transport read resolves when shutdown closes the connection
a fanout consumer that returns while active closes the session

requiredBehaviors: prefixes V2 user and backend text once
sends V1 handoff output through function-call output
handles V2 progress final steering and no-op acknowledgements
routes realtime handoff delegation text with XML escaping
tracks output audio duration and truncates matching items on user speech
queues one response create request while a default response is active and sends it after completion
edgeCases: already-prefixed V2 text is not prefixed twice
handoff output before an active handoff is a no-op
stale V2 handoff progress is ignored
input speech for a different item leaves output audio state alone
invalid audio metadata produces zero duration and no truncate payload
response-create failures emit one error event
server error events reach fanout and close the active session with error reason

requiredBehaviors: builds realtime session config with prompt startup context model version mode modality and voice
builds realtime session config directly from session history when no startup context override is supplied
rejects text output modality for V1 sessions
validates voice support by realtime protocol version
selects WebSocket by default and preserves caller SDP for WebRTC requests
edgeCases: caller prompt replaces configured backend prompt when provided
null prompt clears the backend prompt while preserving startup context
session cwd resolves from nested session configuration shapes
direct cwd and session-configuration cwd shapes build startup context
unsupported voice reports the allowed voices for the selected version
transport connection failure leaves the manager idle

requiredBehaviors: formats current thread user and assistant turns with contextual user fragments omitted
uses shared contextual user fragment detection for instruction hook skill shell editor and tool-result injections
groups recent work by workspace root with current workspace first and newest work next
renders a bounded workspace tree with noisy names omitted
wraps available sections in startup context tags and returns null when every section is empty
edgeCases: long thread text is truncated within the requested token budget
tiny final budgets preserve startup wrapper tags
aggregate section truncation preserves startup wrapper tags
newest recent work is kept before the thread cap is applied
mixed-case contextual tags are matched
multipart content with one contextual fragment is omitted from the current thread section
duplicate recent asks in the same workspace render once
unreadable directories do not stop surrounding tree rendering
symlink entries render without recursive descent
large directories render a bounded entry list plus remaining count
